case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. SANTOS ISAIAS OCHOA GALO

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10/07/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
